issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with cost specification. Current DSL lacks cost definition (➀ and rest requirement).
SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: filter for {Donquixote Pirates} type, deck depth limit (5 cards), reveal mechanic, and bottom placement logic for remaining cards.

Action sequence incomplete. Effect requires: (1) look at top 5 cards, (2) reveal up to 1 {Donquixote Pirates} card, (3) add to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only has a basic SearchDeck.
